meaning: adj.平常的,普通的,平凡的n.[律] 推事,<英>[宗]罪犯的忏悔牧师
examples: It was just an ordinary day.
I class myself as an ordinary working person.
Either way, the assets grow tax-deferred and withdrawals are taxed as ordinary income, not capital gain.
All these nest eggs of Berkshire Hathaway shares are the trust funds of the ordinary shareholders.
